name: PELOTON INTERACTIVE, INC.
summary: PART I Overview Peloton is a leading global fitness and wellness company that empowers its Members to live fit, strong, long, and happy by providing fitness and wellness products and services they can use anytime, anywhere. We have a highly engaged community of approximately 6 million Members as of June30, 2025, across the United States, United Kingdom, Canada, Germany, Australia, and Austria.
